title: tephrosia zoutpansbergensis
intro: Tephrosia zoutpansbergensis, also known as the Zoutpansberg spider-flower or Zoutpansberg pea-flower, is a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its alkaloids. The health benefits of Tephrosia zoutpansbergensis include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia zoutpansbergensis can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
